kpis.label: BU2 Rolling Cash
kpis.value: $102.783k . Was the change right? - BU1 directionally improved on , but still not clean quote-ready performance because analytics closes and deals/ conflict. - BU2 is not scale-safe: spend/leads are appearing without same-day revenue, and Nikolaus Rowe needs booking ownership/reschedule confirmation. Decision: - Reconcile + investigate. Do not scale-language or hard-quote BU1  ROAS until close/deal/ mapping is reconciled. - Smallest next actions: 1. Confirm what source created the BU1 $18.250k  and why analytics still says 0 closed. 2. Confirm Nikolaus Rowe’s OnceHub booking was actually moved to Monday and remains owned. 3. Keep BU2 in verification mode until tracking/booking path + downstream  proves out. Source coverage: - Slack API: no newer post-20:00 accessible-channel messages. - Key private/zero-member channels remain bot-inaccessible/not-in-channel. - Gmail/Drive/iMessage/local artifacts/Voice Memos: no other new UGCMA delta found. - Updated OPEN_LOOPS.md, appended today’s daily log, saved the brief, and refreshed the local assistant kanban snapshot

mandate.headline: Jaamal is out — Richard is stepping up as accountable UGCMA command lead.
mandate.objective: Maximize trust by making the business feel controlled: numbers, blockers, decisions, content, team follow-through, and owner updates in one place.
